revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Japanese Buddhist Pantheon |titlestyle = background-color:#afa3bf;color:white; |belowstyle = background-color:#afa3bf; |state = collapsed |title = [[Japanese Buddhist pantheon|{{color|white|Japanese Buddhist pantheon}}]] |bodyclass = hlist |image = [[File:Daibutsu of Todaiji 4.jpg|150px]] |group1 = [[Buddhas]]
如来部 (Nyorai-bu) |list1 = * [[The Buddha|Śākyamuni (Shaka Nyorai)]] * [[Amitābha|Amitābha (Amida Nyorai)]] * [[Bhaisajyaguru|Bhaiṣajyaguru (Yakushi Nyorai)]] * [[Vairocana|Vairocana (Dainichi Nyorai)]] * [[Five Tathāgatas|Five Wisdom Buddhas (Godai Nyorai)]] |group2 = [[Bodhisattva]]s
菩薩部 (Bosatsu-bu) |list2 = * [[Maitreya|Maitreya (Miroku)]] * [[Avalokiteśvara|Avalokiteśvara (Kannon)]] * [[Samantabhadra (Bodhisattva)|Samantabhadra (Fugen)]] * [[Manjushri|Mañjuśrī (Monju)]] * [[Mahāpratisarā|Mahāpratisarā (Daizuigu)]] * [[Kṣitigarbha|Kṣitigarbha (Jizō)]] * [[Ākāśagarbha|Ākāśagarbha (Kokūzō)]] * [[Mahasthamaprapta|Mahāsthāmaprāpta (Seishi)]] * [[Vajrasattva|Vajrasattva (Kongōsatta)]] * [[Vajrapāramitā|Vajrapāramitā (Kongō-Haramitsu)]] |group3 = [[Wisdom King]]s
明王部 (Myōō-bu) |list3 = * [[Five Wisdom Kings]] * [[Acala|Acala (Fudō-Myōō)]] * [[Rāgarāja|Rāgarāja (Aizen-Myōō)]] * [[Ucchusma |Ucchuṣma (Ususama-Myōō)]] * [[Hayagriva (Buddhism)|Hayagrīva (Batō-Myōō)]] * [[Mahamayuri|Mahāmāyūrī (Kujaku-Myoō)]] * [[Yamantaka|Yamāntaka (Daiitoku-Myoō)]] |group4 = [[Deity|Heavenly deities]]
天部 (Ten-bu) |list4 = *[[Four Heavenly Kings|Four Heavenly Kings (Shitennō)]] *[[Eight Legions|Eight Legions (Hachi-Bushū)]] *Twelve Devas (Jūni-ten) *[[Twelve Heavenly Generals|Twelve Heavenly Generals (Jūni Shinshō)]] *Twenty-Eight Legions (Nijūhachi-Bushū) *[[Benzaiten|Sarasvatī (Benzaiten)]] *[[Vaiśravaṇa|Vaiśravaṇa (Bishamonten)]] *[[Śakra (Buddhism)|Śakra (Taishakuten)]] *[[Brahmā (Buddhism)|Brahmā (Bonten)]] *[[Shiva in Buddhism|Maheśvara (Daijizaiten)]] *[[Daikokuten|Mahākāla (Daikokuten)]] *[[Dakini|Ḍākinī (Dakiniten)]] *[[Yama (Buddhism)|Yama (Enma-Daiō)]] *Gigeiten *[[Skanda (Buddhism)|Skanda (Idaten)]] *[[Ishana|Īśāna (Ishanaten)]] *[[Prithvi|Pṛthvī (Jiten)]] *[[Kangiten|Gaṇapati (Kankiten)]] *[[Hariti|Hārītī (Kishimojin)]] *[[Apsara|Apsara (Hiten)]] *[[Kalaviṅka|Kalaviṅka (Karyōbinga)]] *[[Kisshōten|Lakṣmī (Kisshōten)]] *[[Marici (Buddhism)|Mārīcī (Marishiten)]] *[[Nio (Buddhism)|Vajrapāṇi (Niō)]] |group5 = [[Avatar|Circumstantial appearances]]
垂迹身部 (Suijakushin-bu) |list5 = *Akiha Gongen *Ishizuchi Daigongen *Ochi Daigongen *[[Kumano Gongen]] *Sanki Daigongen *[[Zaō Gongen]] *Suzuka Gongen *Seiryū Gongen *Tateyama Gongen *Chimyō Gongen *Nezu Gongen *Hakusan Gongen *Haguro Gongen *Hachiōji Gongen *Hiryō Gongen *Sannō Gongen *Futara Gongen *Yuga Daigongen *Hikosan Gongen *Shiromine Gongen *Izuna Gongen *[[Atago Gongen]] *[[Konpira Gongen|Konpira Daigongen]] |group6 = Religious masters
高僧・祖師部 (Kōsō・Soshi-bu) |list6 = * [[Nagarjuna|Nāgārjuna (Ryūju)]] * [[Vasubandhu|Vasubandhu (Seshin)]] * [[Bodhidharma]] * [[Prince Shōtoku]] * [[Kūkai]] * [[Saichō]] * [[Eisai]] * [[Dōgen|Dōgen Kigen]] * [[Genshin]] * [[Hōnen]] * [[Ippen]] * [[Shinran]] * [[Nichiren]] * [[Sixteen Arhats]] |below = * [[Japanese Zen|{{color|white|Zen}}]] * [[Tendai|{{color|white|Tendai}}]] * [[Shingon|{{color|white|Shingon}}]] * [[Pure Land Buddhism|{{color|white|Pure Land}}]] * [[Shugendō|{{color|white|Shugendō}}]] * [[Nichiren Buddhism|{{color|white|Nichiren}}]] * [[Japanese mythology|{{color|white|Japanese mythology}}]] }} [[Category:Buddhism in Japan templates]]

明王部 (Myōō-bu) |list3 = * [[:en:Five Wisdom Kings|Five Wisdom Kings]] * [[Acala|Acala (Fudō-Myōō)]] * [[Rāgarāja|Rāgarāja (Aizen-Myōō)]] * [[Ucchusma |Ucchuṣma (Ususama-Myōō)]] * [[Hayagriva (Buddhism)|Hayagrīva (Batō-Myōō)]] * [[Mahamayuri|Mahāmāyūrī (Kujaku-Myoō)]] * [[Yamantaka|Yamāntaka (Daiitoku-Myoō)]] |group4 = [[Kami|Heavenly deities]]

明王部 (Myōō-bu) |list3 = * [[:en:Five Wisdom Kings|Five Wisdom Kings]] * [[Acala|Acala (Fudō-Myōō)]] * [[Rāgarāja|Rāgarāja (Aizen-Myōō)]] * [[Ucchusma |Ucchuṣma (Ususama-Myōō)]] * [[Hayagriva (Buddhism)|Hayagrīva (Batō-Myōō)]] * [[Mahamayuri|Mahāmāyūrī (Kujaku-Myoō)]] * [[Yamantaka|Yamāntaka (Daiitoku-Myoō)]] |group4 = [[Kami|Heavenly deities]]

{{Navbox |name = Japanese Buddhist Pantheon |titlestyle = background-color:#afa3bf;color:white; |belowstyle = background-color:#afa3bf; |state = collapsed |title = [[Japanese Buddhist pantheon|{{color|white|Japanese Buddhist pantheon}}]] |bodyclass = hlist |image = [[File:Daibutsu of Todaiji 4.jpg|150px]] |group1 = [[:en:Buddhas|Buddhas]]
如来部 (Nyorai-bu) |list1 = * [[The Buddha|Shakyamuni (Shaka Nyorai)]] * [[Amitābha|Amitābha (Amida Nyorai)]] * [[:en:Bhaisajyaguru|Bhaiṣajyaguru (Yakushi Nyorai)]] * [[Vairocana|Vairocana (Dainichi Nyorai)]] * [[:en:Five Tathāgatas|Five Wisdom Buddhas (Godai Nyorai)]] |group2 = [[:en:Bodhisattva|Bodhisattva]]s
菩薩部 (Bosatsu-bu) |list2 = * [[Maitreya|Maitreya (Miroku)]] * [[:en:Avalokiteśvara|Avalokiteśvara (Kannon)]] * [[Samantabhadra (Bodhisattva)|Samantabhadra (Fugen)]] * [[Manjushri|Mañjuśrī (Monju)]] * [[Mahāpratisarā|Mahāpratisarā (Daizuigu)]] * [[:en:Kṣitigarbha|Kṣitigarbha (Jizō)]] * [[:en:Ākāśagarbha|Ākāśagarbha (Kokūzō)]] * [[:en:Mahasthamaprapta|Mahāsthāmaprāpta (Seishi)]] * [[Vajrasattva|Vajrasattva (Kongōsatta)]] * [[Vajrapāramitā|Vajrapāramitā (Kongō-Haramitsu)]] |group3 = [[Wisdom King]]s
明王部 (Myōō-bu) |list3 = * [[:en:Five Wisdom Kings|Five Wisdom Kings]] * [[Acala|Acala (Fudō-Myōō)]] * [[Rāgarāja|Rāgarāja (Aizen-Myōō)]] * [[Ucchusma |Ucchuṣma (Ususama-Myōō)]] * [[:en:Hayagriva (Buddhism)|Hayagrīva (Batō-Myōō)]] * [[Mahamayuri|Mahāmāyūrī (Kujaku-Myoō)]] * [[Yamantaka|Yamāntaka (Daiitoku-Myoō)]] |group4 = [[Kami|Heavenly deities]]
天部 (Ten-bu) |list4 = *[[Four Heavenly Kings|Four Heavenly Kings (Shitennō)]] *[[:en:Eight Legions|Eight Legions (Hachi-Bushū)]] *Twelve Devas (Jūni-ten) *[[Twelve Heavenly Generals|Twelve Heavenly Generals (Jūni Shinshō)]] *Twenty-Eight Legions (Nijūhachi-Bushū) *[[Benzaiten|Sarasvatī (Benzaiten)]] *[[Vaiśravaṇa|Vaiśravaṇa (Bishamonten)]] *[[:en:Śakra (Buddhism)|Śakra (Taishakuten)]] *[[:en:Brahmā (Buddhism)|Brahmā (Bonten)]] *[[Shiva in Buddhism|Maheśvara (Daijizaiten)]] *[[Daikokuten|Mahākāla (Daikokuten)]] *[[Dakini|Ḍākinī (Dakiniten)]] *[[Yama (Buddhism)|Yama (Enma-Daiō)]] *Gigeiten *[[Skanda (Buddhism)|Skanda (Idaten)]] *[[:en:Ishana|Īśāna (Ishanaten)]] *[[Prithvi|Pṛthvī (Jiten)]] *[[:en:Kangiten|Gaṇapati (Kankiten)]] *[[:en:Hariti|Hārītī (Kishimojin)]] *[[:en:Apsara|Apsara (Hiten)]] *[[:en:Kalaviṅka|Kalaviṅka (Karyōbinga)]] *[[Kisshōten|Lakṣmī (Kisshōten)]] *[[Marici (Buddhism)|Mārīcī (Marishiten)]] *[[Nio (Buddhism)|Vajrapāṇi (Niō)]] |group5 = [[:en:Avatar|Circumstantial appearances]]
垂迹身部 (Suijakushin-bu) |list5 = *Akiha Gongen *Ishizuchi Daigongen *Ochi Daigongen *[[Kumano Gongen]] *Sanki Daigongen *[[Zaō Gongen]] *Suzuka Gongen *Seiryū Gongen *Tateyama Gongen *Chimyō Gongen *Nezu Gongen *Hakusan Gongen *Haguro Gongen *Hachiōji Gongen *Hiryō Gongen *Sannō Gongen *Futara Gongen *Yuga Daigongen *Hikosan Gongen *Shiromine Gongen *Izuna Gongen *[[Atago Gongen]] *[[Konpira Gongen|Konpira Daigongen]] |group6 = Religious masters
高僧・祖師部 (Kōsō・Soshi-bu) |list6 = * [[Nagarjuna|Nāgārjuna (Ryūju)]] * [[Vasubandhu|Vasubandhu (Seshin)]] * [[:en:Bodhidharma|Bodhidharma]] * [[Prince Shōtoku]] * [[:en:Kūkai|Kūkai]] * [[Saichō]] * [[:en:Eisai|Eisai]] * [[:en:Dōgen|Dōgen Kigen]] * [[:en:Genshin|Genshin]] * [[:en:Hōnen|Hōnen]] * [[Ippen]] * [[Shinran]] * [[Nichiren]] * [[Sixteen Arhats]] |below = * [[:en:Japanese Zen|{{color|white|Zen}}]] * [[Tendai|{{color|white|Tendai}}]] * [[Shingon|{{color|white|Shingon}}]] * [[Pure Land Buddhism|{{color|white|Pure Land}}]] * [[Shugendō|{{color|white|Shugendō}}]] * [[Nichiren Buddhism|{{color|white|Nichiren}}]] * [[Japanese mythology|{{color|white|Japanese mythology}}]] }} [[Category:Buddhism in Japan templates]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Japanese Buddhist Pantheon]][[Category:qq]]
